messages.content:
Two states are said to be equivalent if for each member of the set of inputs, they give exactly the same output."
	a. maybe
	b. FALSE
	c. TRUE
	d. cannot be ascertain
c. TRUE
The triangular symbol indicates that the flip-flop is clocked at the ______ edge of the clock pulse.
positive (or rising) edge

In sequential circuits, the present outputs depend on the _______ inputs and the _______ states stored in the memory elements."
	a. "previous, previous"
	b. "present, present"
	c. "previous, present"
	d. "present, previous"
	e. none of the above
c. "previous, present"

The flip-flop stores only one bit. A clocked sequential circuit usually utilizes several flip-flops to store a number of bits as required.
	a. maybe
	b. FALSE
	c. TRUE
	d. cannot be ascertain
c. TRUE
What circuits contain combinational circuits along with memory?(answer in small letters, one word)
sequential circuits
The circle at the clear input means that clear input must be _____ for normal operation.
HIGH (or 1)

The number of states may be reduced by state reduction method.
	a. maybe
	b. FALSE
	c. TRUE
	d. cannot be ascertain
c. TRUE

To regenerate the output sequence in synchronous sequential circuit we use _______.
		K map
		reduced state table
		excitation table
		state diagram
		all of the above
d. state diagram

What is a tabulated representation which consists of input, present state, next state and output?"
		Quine-Mcluskey
		K map table
		state table
		all of the above
c. state table

The SR flip-flop is an important circuit because all other flip-flops are built from it.
		maybe
		FALSE
		TRUE
		cannot be ascertain
c. TRUE

Will the outputs do not change states with inputs only on the occurrence of a clock pulse for clocked RS flip-flop?
		maybe
		FALSE
		TRUE
		cannot be ascertain
b. FALSE
